summary: Comprehensive testing of 5 new Intensiti features completed. All backend APIs (33/33) and frontend UI features working correctly. New features: 50/50 split layout with Gauche/Droite content pickers, ticker speed control slider, multiple RSS feeds management, RSS batch endpoint, advanced playlist scheduling with day-of-week and month selectors.
passed_tests: --- NEW FEATURE 2: MULTIPLE RSS FEEDS (3 tests) ---
PUT /api/settings with multiple rss_items array saves correctly
--- NEW FEATURE 3: RSS BATCH ENDPOINT (3 tests) ---
POST /api/rss/batch with single URL returns items
POST /api/rss/batch with multiple URLs returns combined items
POST /api/rss/batch with empty urls returns empty items
Playlist schedule_days and schedule_months fields save correctly
--- NEW FEATURE 5: 50/50 SPLIT LAYOUT & RSS SLIDE (4 tests) ---
Split slide with split_left_type/content and split_right_type/content saves
Multiple content type combinations (youtube|qrcode, text|rss, countdown|media) work
RSS slide type with rss_url content saves correctly
Display endpoint returns settings with ticker_speed and rss_items
Settings page: Ticker speed slider visible under 'Diffusion' section (30s default)
Settings page: Multiple RSS feeds inputs visible (name + URL fields with data-testid)
Playlists page: Schedule button (calendar icon) visible on playlist cards
Playlists page: Schedule dialog shows 7 day buttons (Lun-Dim) and 12 month buttons (Jan-Dec)
Playlist Editor: Add slide dialog has Disposition dropdown with 50/50 option
Playlist Editor: 50/50 layout shows Gauche and Droite content pickers
Playlist Editor: 6 content types available (Media, YouTube, QR Code, Compte a rebours, Texte, Flux RSS)
Display page: Header shows logo, time, date, weather with 3-day forecast
Display page: Footer ticker scrolls RSS headlines (animationDuration controlled by ticker_speed)
Display page: Slides transition correctly (QR Code, Text slides verified)
seed_data_creation: None - test playlists cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features verified working: (1) 50/50 split layout stores split_left_type, split_left_content, split_right_type, split_right_content in slide object - UI shows Gauche/Droite pickers when layout=split selected. (2) Ticker speed slider in Settings Diffusion section, value persists via PUT /api/settings with ticker_speed. Display page applies animationDuration from ticker_speed. (3) Multiple RSS feeds via rss_items array in settings with id/url/name/is_active/order structure. (4) RSS batch endpoint POST /api/rss/batch accepts {urls:[]} and returns combined items. (5) Playlist scheduling with schedule_days (0-6 for Mon-Sun) and schedule_months (1-12) arrays, UI has 7 day buttons and 12 month buttons. Backend checks scheduling logic in /api/display/{code}. Display code for testing: 386621.
